name: Stabilized Whipped Cream Icing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup heavy whipping cream (at least 24 hours old and very cold)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gelatin and cold water in a small saucepan. Let stand until thick.
2. Place over low heat, stirring constantly just until the gelatin dissolves.
3. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
4. Whip cream, sugar, and vanilla until slightly thickened.
5. While beating slowly, gradually add the gelatin to the whipped cream mixture.
6. Whip at high speed until stiff.
Yield: 2 cups. Cakes iced with whipped cream must be kept refrigerated. (This is the commercial recipe used by bakeries).
